prompt: An abstract surreal image of hundreds of thin glowing strands, each individual strand clearly flowing toward the right with visible directional motion and streak-like detail, but collectively forming a large sweeping curved structure that strongly bends and points toward the left. The local rightward motion must be unmistakable, while the global silhouette clearly faces left. The contradiction between local motion and global shape must be visually striking and immediately noticeable. No text, no symbols, no arrows, no numbers. Clean background, minimal palette, cinematic lighting, strong depth, high contrast between local direction and global form.
visual_logic: Local strands flow right while the overall structure bends left, creating a contradiction between individual and aggregate behavior.
